creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Patch to update net-mgmt/vidalia from 0.0.13 to 0.0.14.

Among other things this update adds support for Tor's
HashedControlPassword and CookieAuthentication options.

The official change log can be found at:
http://trac.vidalia-project.net/browser/releases/vidalia-0.0.14/CHANGELOG

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
